title: nulldefault
text: nulldefault Specifies how to handle null values when storing data. USYS$LDP_PARAMS nulldefault { : N1 | N } Arguments N1 —write empty attributes; this is the default N —do not write empty attributes on insert; remove empty attributes on update. Note: However, empty values are written when storing multiple values listed with the separator Gold & separator. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
